allow: Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate-banner -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"bannerPrompt":"AI Automation Mastery - Learn to build income systems with no-code tools","bannerStyle":"Modern","colorPreference":"#6f3aea","bannerSize":"1200x400"}' -o banner-purple.png)

Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate-banner -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"bannerPrompt":"Skool Community Mastery - Build engaged and thriving communities","bannerStyle":"Modern","colorPreference":"#ff9500","bannerSize":"1200x400"}' -o banner-orange.png)
Bash(rm -f banner-*.png && echo "Test banners cleaned up")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate-banner -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"bannerPrompt":"Skool Community Mastery - Build engaged communities","bannerStyle":"modern","colorPreference":"#6f3aea","bannerSize":"1200x400"}' -o test_banner.png)
